pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21 to support the new JDK baseline.
Adopt Spring Boot 3.2.3 as the parent POM to manage dependencies and build configuration for the new JDK.
Bump the Keycloak dependency version to 24.0.5 to align with the supported server version.
Add JVM arguments to export internal security packages required by dependencies on Java 21.
Import the Jackson BOM to manage JSON processing library versions.
Import the Resteasy BOM to manage JAX-RS implementation versions.
Import the Keycloak Parent BOM to manage Keycloak-related dependency versions.
Add the Spring Boot Starter dependency for core application functionality.
Add the Spring Boot Starter Validation dependency for bean validation support.
Add the Spring Security Crypto dependency for cryptographic utilities.
Add the Spring Boot Configuration Processor for metadata generation.
Add the Spring Boot Loader dependency for executable JAR support.
Add the SnakeYAML dependency for YAML parsing.
Add the Keycloak Admin Client dependency for interacting with the Keycloak server.
Add the Apache Commons Codec dependency for encoding utilities.
Add the Apache Commons IO dependency for I/O utilities.
Add the Apache Commons Text dependency for string operations.
Add the Apache Commons Lang3 dependency for general utility classes.
Add the Failsafe library for retry logic.
Add the Logstash Logback Encoder for structured logging.
Add the Spring Boot Starter Test dependency for testing support.
Add the Keycloak Authz Client dependency for authorization testing.
Add the Testcontainers dependency for containerized testing.
Add the Testcontainers JUnit Jupiter module for JUnit 5 integration.
Add the JUnit Pioneer library for additional JUnit 5 extensions.
Add the MockServer Spring Test Listener for mocking HTTP services.
Add the UnboundID LDAP SDK for LDAP testing.
Add the Maven Release Plugin for managing release cycles.
Add the JaCoCo Maven Plugin for code coverage.
Add the License Maven Plugin for managing license headers.
Add the Maven Replacer Plugin for text replacement during builds.
Add the PMD Maven Plugin for static code analysis.
Add the SpotBugs Maven Plugin for bug detection.
Add the Checkstyle Maven Plugin for code style enforcement.
Add the Reproducible Build Maven Plugin for deterministic builds.
Add the Git Commit ID Plugin for embedding git information in the build.
Add the Keep A Changelog Maven Plugin for changelog management.
Add the Maven SCM Plugin for source control management operations.
Configure the Maven Resources Plugin for property encoding.
Configure the Maven Compiler Plugin to enable lint warnings.
Configure the Maven Failsafe Plugin with system properties for tests.
Configure the Maven Release Plugin with custom preparation and completion goals.
Configure the Maven Replacer Plugin to update Chart.yaml versions.
Configure the PMD Plugin to run checks during the build.
Configure the SpotBugs Plugin to run checks during the build.
Configure the Checkstyle Plugin to run checks during the validate phase.
Configure the Maven JAR Plugin to include git commit info in the manifest.
Configure the Spring Boot Maven Plugin to use ZIP layout.
Configure the Reproducible Build Plugin to strip JAR timestamps.
Add a Maven profile to support Keycloak versions prior to 19 with legacy code replacements.
Add a Maven profile to support Keycloak versions prior to 22 with legacy code replacements.

.github/workflows/ci.yaml.general_idea: Change the CI workflow trigger from the 'develop' branch to 'main' to align with the new default branch strategy.
Add support for triggering the CI workflow on version tags (v*) to enable automated release processes.
Upgrade the Java runtime used in the CI build from version 11 to version 21 to match the target JDK migration.
Update the Keycloak version matrix to test against modern versions (18.0.2 through 24.0.5) instead of legacy versions (8.0.1, 9.0.0).
Introduce conditional logic to apply specific Maven profiles and dependency overrides for Keycloak versions older than 23.0.0, 22.0.0, and 19.0.0 to handle API changes.
Switch the build command from using the system 'mvn' to the project-local './mvnw' wrapper to ensure consistent build environments.
Upgrade the actions/checkout action from v2 to v4.1.1 and configure it to fetch full history for release tagging.
Upgrade the actions/setup-java action from v1 to v4.2.1 and specify the 'temurin' distribution.
Upgrade the actions/cache action from v1 to v4.0.1 and refine the cache key to include the Keycloak version for better cache isolation.
Upgrade the codecov/codecov-action from v1 to v4.4.1 and adjust configuration for file paths and error handling.
Add steps to log in to Docker Hub and Quay.io registries using secrets, conditional on tag pushes.
Implement a multi-stage Docker build and push process using docker/build-push-action, supporting multi-platform images (amd64/arm64) for releases.
Upgrade the actions/upload-artifact action from v1 to v4.3.3 and update the artifact naming and path structure.
Add a new CI job 'build-pom-version' to verify the project builds correctly against Java 17 and 21 using the POM-defined Java version.
Add a new CI job 'build-legacy' to specifically test compatibility with Keycloak 19.0.3 legacy builds.
Add a new CI job 'lint-other-files' to lint YAML workflow files and Helm charts using yamllint and chart-testing.
Add a new CI job 'create_release' to automatically create GitHub releases with artifacts when a version tag is pushed.
Update Maven CLI options to include network timeout settings and disable the Spring banner for cleaner CI logs.
Disable Testcontainers Ryuk container to prevent issues with resource cleanup in the CI environment.

.gitignore.general_idea: Ignore backup and tag files generated by the Maven Release Plugin to keep the working tree clean.
Ignore the release.properties file generated during Maven release processes.
Ignore directories containing native image configuration files, likely generated by GraalVM or similar tools.
Ignore the providers directory, likely containing generated service provider configuration files.
Ignore root-level JSON files, possibly generated configuration or test data.
Ignore directories starting with 'test', likely containing generated test resources or outputs.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Migrate the Docker base images from Java 11 to Java 21 to align with the target JDK version.
Switch from copying a pre-built JAR to building the application inside the Docker container using Maven.
Implement a multi-stage build to separate the build environment from the runtime environment for a smaller final image.
Replace the generic bash entrypoint with a specific Java execution command that passes arguments correctly.
Run the container process as a non-root user to improve security posture.
Define standard environment variables for Java options and Keycloak configuration within the image.

LICENSE.txt.general_idea: Replace the generic copyright year and owner placeholders with the actual company details.
LICENSE.txt.human_impl: Changed 'Copyright [yyyy] [name of copyright owner]' to 'Copyright 2020 adorsys GmbH & Co. KG'

README.md.general_idea: Replace Travis CI and CodeClimate badges with GitHub Actions, GitHub Releases, Docker Hub, and License badges to reflect the new CI/CD infrastructure.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced `[![Build Status](https://travis-ci.com/...)]` with `[![CI](https://github.com/.../workflows/CI/badge.svg)]` and added release/download badges.

README.md.general_idea: Rewrite the project title and introduction to accurately describe 'keycloak-config-cli' as a state-management utility rather than a generic 'keycloak-tools' collection.
README.md.human_impl: Changed `# keycloak-tools` to `# keycloak-config-cli` and updated the description to focus on JSON/YAML realm configuration.

README.md.general_idea: Remove the 'Submodules' table as the project structure has likely been flattened or the tool is now the primary focus.
README.md.human_impl: Deleted the `## Submodules` section containing the `config-cli` folder description.

README.md.general_idea: Update file paths in the documentation to match the new repository structure (e.g., moving examples to `contrib/`).
Add comprehensive documentation for the variable substitution feature, including supported prefixes and examples.
README.md.human_impl: Added `## Variable Substitution` section with code block listing `$(base64Decoder:...)`, `$(env:...)`, etc.

README.md.general_idea: Remove the static compatibility matrix table which is no longer maintained or relevant for the new versioning strategy.
README.md.human_impl: Deleted the `## Compatibility matrix` table listing Keycloak 4.x through 9.x support.

README.md.general_idea: Modernize build instructions to use the Maven Wrapper (`mvnw`) and specify JDK/Docker requirements.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced `$ mvn package` with `./mvnw verify` and added notes about JDK and Docker Desktop requirements.

README.md.general_idea: Update the 'Run this project' section to reflect new CLI arguments and jar location.
README.md.human_impl: Changed `java -jar ./config-cli/target/config-cli.jar` to `java -jar ./target/keycloak-config-cli.jar` with updated flags like `--import.files.locations`.

README.md.general_idea: Rewrite Docker documentation to include available tags, build instructions, and updated run commands.
README.md.human_impl: Added `## Docker` section with tag descriptions (`latest`, `edge`, etc.) and updated `docker run` command with new environment variables.

README.md.general_idea: Remove the outdated `docker-compose.yml` example from the README.
README.md.human_impl: Deleted the `#### Docker-compose` section containing the YAML service definition.

README.md.general_idea: Add documentation for the Helm chart deployment option.
Add detailed tables for CLI options and environment variables for Keycloak, Import, and Spring Boot settings.
README.md.human_impl: Added `# Configuration` section with tables for `--keycloak.url`, `--import.files.locations`, etc.

README.md.general_idea: Update the release process documentation to include GPG signing steps and Maven release plugin commands.
README.md.human_impl: Added `# Perform release` section with `gpg --full-generate-key` and `./mvnw release:prepare` commands.

README.md.general_idea: Add a section pointing to commercial support options.
README.md.human_impl: Added `# Commercial support` section linking to adorsys.com.

docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Migrate Keycloak service from the deprecated jboss namespace to the official quay.io registry.
Replace hardcoded Keycloak version with a variable to allow flexible version management.
Update environment variables to match Keycloak 17+ admin configuration standards (KEYCLOAK_ADMIN instead of KEYCLOAK_USER).
Change Keycloak startup command to use the new Quarkus-based 'start-dev' mode instead of legacy standalone flags.
Explicitly enable the admin fine-grained authorization feature via command line argument.
Introduce a separate legacy Keycloak service definition to support older versions or compatibility testing.
Add an OpenLDAP service to the compose file for integration testing or user federation.
Update the Keycloak Config CLI image name to remove the domain prefix.
Refactor Keycloak Config CLI environment variables to use property-style naming and update profile settings.
Change the volume mount path for the configuration CLI to point to the new example config directory.
Remove the deprecated 'links' directive from the docker-compose file as it is no longer needed with default networking.
